import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut running = true
  while running
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let n = string.len(line)
      mut idx = -1
      mut i = 0
      while i < n and idx == -1
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 61
            idx = i
          end
        when None
          idx = idx
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      if idx > 0
        let key = string.substring(line, 0, idx)
        let value = string.substring(line, idx + 1, n)
        println("#{key}:#{value}")
      end
    when None
      running = false
    end
  end
end
